domain: Korean pansori musical epic-storytelling: 2 performers sorikkun (singer-narrator) + gosu (drummer + chuimsae caller); 3-mode performance flow sori (sung) + aniri (spoken) + ballim (gesture); 4 jangdan rhythmic cycles jinyangjo-jungmori-jajinmori-hwimori; chuimsae shouted call-response from gosu + audience; up to 8-hour epic length with sustained phase coherence; 5 traditional masterworks (Chunhyang-ga, Sim-cheong-ga, Heungbu-ga, Sugung-ga, Jeokbyeok-ga).
specific_mechanism: PANSORI-2-ROLE-3-MODE-4-JANGDAN-CHUIMSAE-PHASE-COHERENCE: LLM phase-coherence mechanism with (1) 2-role split sorikkun/gosu: 2 sub-models — sorikkun (narrative-generator) + gosu (rhythm-attender); paired across roles; (2) 3-mode flow {sori-sung / aniri-spoken / ballim-gesture}: 3 mode-routings the sorikkun cycles through (continuous-tone / discrete-token / non-verbal-vector); transitions smooth; (3) 4-jangdan rhythmic cycle bank B_jangdan: 4 prescribed temporal-phase patterns (18-beat lament / 12-beat narrative / 12-beat fast / 4-beat climax); per-segment phase template; (4) chuimsae call-response phase-lock ϕ_chuim: gosu adds zero-content phase-anchor tokens at jangdan-bar boundaries, snapping sorikkun back to rhythm-template; (5) long-form phase-coherence loss L_phase: penalty for drift > π/4 across long generation. Differs from R527 DIEVTURIBA-8-SOLAR-13-LUNAR-DUAL-RING and R540 DANBAU-1-STRING-7-NODE-FLEXOR and R545 GEORGIAN-3-VOICE-TRIAD-DISSONANT by 2-role sorikkun/gosu split + 3-mode sori-aniri-ballim flow + 4-jangdan cycle bank + chuimsae call-response phase-lock + long-form drift penalty.
llm_application: PANSORI-2-ROLE-3-MODE-4-JANGDAN-CHUIMSAE-PHASE-COHERENCE LLM mechanism + 2-role split sorikkun-gosu narrative-generator rhythm-attender paired + 3-mode flow sori-sung aniri-spoken ballim-gesture continuous-discrete-vector routing + 4-jangdan rhythmic cycle bank 18-12-12-4 beat per-segment temporal-phase template + chuimsae call-response phase-lock zero-content anchor + long-form phase-coherence loss L_phase drift-penalty. Differs from R527 DIEVTURIBA (closest — 8-spoke + 13-phase + dual-ring coherence). R540 DANBAU (closest — 1-shared-stream + 7-node + continuous flexor + septimal). R545 GEORGIAN (closest — 3-voice-band + Georgian-Triad + 2-melismatic). Differs from Cross-modal Info Hubs + Speech LM Survey + SpeakerLM + Cross-Modal Silent Speech by 2-role + 3-mode + 4-jangdan + chuimsae + long-form drift. Differs by 2-ROLE SORIKKUN-GOSU + 3-MODE SORI-ANIRI-BALLIM + 4-JANGDAN CYCLE BANK + CHUIMSAE CALL-RESPONSE PHASE-LOCK + LONG-FORM PHASE-COHERENCE LOSS.
novelty_claim: Probing Cross-modal Info Hubs 2605.10815 + Speech LM Survey ACL 2025 + SpeakerLM 2508.06372 + Cross-Modal Silent Speech Stanford HAI cover cross-modal + speaker-diarization + speech-LM paradigm. PANSORI-2-ROLE-3-MODE-4-JANGDAN-CHUIMSAE-PHASE-COHERENCE adds (a) 2-role split + (b) 3-mode flow + (c) 4-jangdan cycle bank + (d) chuimsae call-response phase-lock + (e) long-form phase-coherence drift-penalty. Recombination — borderline lookup.
